content.en:
Ye Tian urged the Legendary Blood Treasure, then devoured and refined various resources, and then went to cultivate the Red Dragon Legendary Body.

As time passed, it didn't take too long for the Red Dragon Legend Body to be thoroughly cultivated.

"Without using other resources, I practiced the Red Dragon Legend Body!"

Ye Tian was in a good mood.

Although it costs a lot of resources to cultivate the Legend of the Red Dragon, he has a lot of ordinary resources and can afford it.

Not to mention one Supreme Legendary Body, even if it is five Supreme Legendary Bodies, he can afford to consume them.

"The Red Dragon Legendary Body has been introduced, and the next step is to cultivate this Legendary Body to the consummation realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Innate Origin Domain Alliance, Sword Domain.

This is the territory of the Sword Clan.

The Sword Clan is also a very powerful vein in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and its strength is second only to the previous Su Domain, and it is about the same as the strength of the Qin Domain.

But at this moment, a group of legendary Dao Realm members of the Sword Clan were sitting together, all looking very sad.

Sitting at the top is the contemporary patriarch of the Sword Clan, the top legend to the Dao Realm Sword Heng, the title of Ancient Sword Emperor in the outside world.

Jian Heng stared at the many legends to the Dao Realm, and said helplessly: "The news has been confirmed, the ancestor has fallen!"

"What, the Ancestor has fallen???" Although other legends to the Dao Realm already had a premonition, it was still a little unbelievable that it was actually announced.

"The ancestor is a patriarch, how could he fall?"

A legend to the Dao realm shouted.

"That's true, the news has been confirmed by the other patriarchs!" Jian Heng said: "The ancestor went to the legendary bitter sea to look for opportunities, but he disappeared for a long time, and it is not until today that the fall of the ancestor is confirmed. Our Sword Clan is just one of the patriarchs, and now that the Ancestor has fallen, the strength of our Sword Clan has plummeted, and the right to speak in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will be greatly reduced in the future!"

"The ancestor's innate primordial treasure should have also been left behind in the Legendary Sea of Bitterness, right?"

A Legendary Dao Realm asked.

"Yes!" Jian Heng nodded slightly, "That innate primordial treasure has always been kept by the ancestor, and it will never be shown to others, the ancestor has fallen, and the innate primordial treasure has naturally been lost." If the innate original treasure is not lost, our sword clan still has hope of rising. "

"That's an innate original treasure!"

The other sword clan legends to the Dao realm were a little unwilling, if that innate primordial treasure was given to them, they would not be without hope of rising and becoming a strong man at the patriarch level.

"We have to go to the Legendary Sea of Bitterness and retrieve the body of the Ancestor!" a legendary Dao realm suggested.

"But that's the legendary sea of bitterness!" Jian Heng frowned, "Even the old ancestor has fallen, which of us dares to go there?"

Another legend said to the Dao realm: "Legend of the bitter sea, the patriarch will be suppressed when he enters the strength, and the ancestor will fall, it does not mean that we will definitely fall." Moreover, we can completely invite those almost invincible Legends to the Dao Realm to enter the Legendary Bitter Sea and pay a certain price, maybe there are Legends to the Dao Realm who are willing. "

"Who are you please?" Those top Legends to the Dao Realm are also afraid of death, and they don't dare to easily step into the Legendary Bitter Sea, even if they dare to enter, they don't dare to go deep into the Legendary Bitter Sea!" said a Legendary Dao Realm, shaking his head.

"No, there is a legendary Dao realm who really dares to enter!"

"Who is it?"

"Elder Ye Tian of the Human Domain!"

When Ye Tian was mentioned, Jian Heng frowned slightly: "How long has Ye Tiancai been an elder?Moreover, his cultivation is not high, even if he is a supreme legend to the Dao realm, his combat power is not necessarily stronger than mine, right?"

"Patriarch, you're wrong!" A legend to the Dao realm, "I am more familiar with the elders of the Longyan Ancient Emperor, so I know more about Ye Tian, and over the years, Ye Tian has also been active outside, his dragon scale legend body is estimated to have been completed, and he has also comprehended the second sequence of Dao rules, the realm is not low, and his cultivation is lower, but the real strength is no less than that of the Suho patriarch before the breakthrough." "

"What, the Dragon Scale Legend is perfect, in this case, Ye Tian's strength is indeed very close to the veteran combat power, I am not as good as him. Moreover, Ye Tian seems to have a lot of clones, he is not afraid of falling, he is the most special one of the Legendary Dao Realm of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, he really dares to enter the Legendary Sea of Bitterness. "

Jian Heng also felt that Ye Tian was undoubtedly the most suitable candidate.

However, there is one more problem.

"That's the innate original treasure, if Ye Tian knows, can he bear it?" Jian Heng was afraid that Ye Tian would kill people and snatch the innate original treasure of their sword clan.

"Patriarch, this is also a helpless way, and we will not mention the innate original treasure, only to take back the corpse of the ancestor. And if he signed an agreement, Elder Ye Tian should not do so. This sword clan legend said to the Dao realm.

"Then what kind of treasure is used to impress Ye Tian? Ordinary treasures, I'm afraid they won't be able to enter his eyes. "

Jian Heng said.

Subsequently, they began to discuss.

In the end, a legendary Dao Realm proposed: "Use the second sequence of Supreme Dao rule items, the low-quality kind, our sword clan also has six such low-quality second-order Supreme Dao rule items, which have always been useless, it is said that Ye Tian is collecting low-quality second-order Supreme Dao rule items, and with a low-quality second-order Supreme Dao rule item, maybe you can invite him." "

"Then I'll talk to him personally!"

Jian Heng decided.

......

The Supreme Void.

Jian Heng came to find Ye Tian, and the two met.

"Ancient Sword Emperor!"

"Elder Ye!"

They sat down.

"What is the Ancient Sword Emperor looking for me?" Ye Tian asked.

Jian Heng didn't beat around the bush, and said directly: "Elder Ye, the patriarch of our clan fell in the legendary bitter sea, and the body was left there, but we don't have the strength or the certainty to take the body of the patriarch of our clan, and ask Elder Ye to help us."

"Legend of the Sea of Bitterness!"

Ye Tian had heard of this place, but he didn't know much about it.

"Ancient Sword Emperor, the elders have all fallen there, my strength is not as good as the elders!" Ye Tiandao.

Jian Heng hurriedly said: "Elder Ye, the strength of the patriarch in the legendary bitter sea is suppressed, and Elder Ye is not necessarily weaker than the average patriarch in the legendary bitter sea. Of course, there are still dangers, but as long as Elder Ye is willing to help, we are willing to take out a low-quality second-order Supreme Dao rule item. "

"Is it a low-quality second-order Dao rule item?"

Ye Tian was a little excited!

He has an innate primordial treasure statue, and after urging it, he can comprehend the second sequence of Dao rule items faster, and if he obtains low-quality second-order Dao rule items, he can really quickly improve the second sequence of Dao rule realms!

So, he was a little excited.

"Three second-order Dao rule items!" Ye Tian demanded.

"Three is too many!"

Jian Heng wants to bargain.

But in the end, the two sides still reached a cooperation, and cooperated with two second-order Dao rule items.
